finding: review-dispatcher uses LLM inference to select review agents while dispatch-rules.json already encodes deterministic regex floors for core security files; the LLM sits in a security-gate path.
recommendation: Extend dispatch-rules.json to cover more deterministic cases; let the dispatcher only add optional agents beyond the deterministic mandatory floor.

finding: check_doc_generated_facts regexes depend on exact prose phrasing; structured markers would be fully deterministic.
recommendation: Optional: structured fact markers (HTML comment/frontmatter). Current is acceptable.

finding: review-dispatcher decision tables are prose interpreted by an LLM rather than a declarative rule engine.
recommendation: Convert tables to JSON trigger conditions + deterministic function; keep LLM as fallback for complex cases.
